details.test: Task 1: Configure New Checkout Flow rollouts in WebApp environments
Task 2: Configure attribute targeting for recommendations_v2 in WebApp Production
Task 3: Create multivariate homepage banner experiment in WebApp Staging
Task 4: Schedule Production flag to turn On at a future date/time
Task 5: Create beta_testers segment and target it with a flag in WebApp Staging
Task 6: Archive most recently updated checkout-tagged flag
Task 7: Review audit log entries by actor in a date range
Task 8: Configure automatic kill switch based on Error rate metric
Task 9: Assign project-scoped role to qa_tester for MobileApp
